title: Assign new subitem status based on parent task's status
excerpt:
I would like newly created subitems to automatically inherit their parent task’s status and assignee. 
Are there any automations that do this? I couldn’t see any but maybe I’m missing it… 
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: chcsep (chcsep)
